scene_summary: Dark earthy mixed-media botanical plate with a pale central scrapbook-like inset, pod forms, root/tendril lines, mossy habitat clusters, small circular markers, a hazy dome, printed tile, and stone-like anchors over a gridded black-and-tan ground. The plate is expressionist but readable: several strong source-bearing marks are visually distinct enough for interaction mapping.

detected_objects.label: yokota-central-memory-square
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large pale rectangular paper inset dominates the center, with visible painted/printed scrapbook surface and botanical marks inside.

detected_objects.label: marsh-house-native-habitat-bed
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Left-side dark moss, leaves, soil-like texture, and plant debris form a broad habitat-like vertical field along the edge of the central paper.

detected_objects.label: radigue-drone-tendril
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Many thin black vine/root lines sweep downward and inward like a slow waveform or drone gesture across the central panel.

detected_objects.label: mcmackin-woodland-understory
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Lower-right mossy stone/crystal cluster reads as a dense native-plant understory pocket with textured green-brown growth and mineral surfaces.

detected_objects.label: sound-leaves-folio
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Open left pod contains leaf-like shards, crystalline fragments, and fine dark lines that read as foliage notation or sound-leaf traces.

detected_objects.label: glass-bell-listening-pocket
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Lower-left translucent rounded dome shape has a cloudy glass-bell silhouette and distinct curved edge against the dark ground.

detected_objects.label: painted-tune-patch
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small printed rectangular color tile in the lower-right central area provides a discrete touchable painted/media patch.

detected_objects.label: small-altar-offering
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small perforated circular disk near the lower center sits where the root lines converge, reading like a ritual paper/soil offering or altar anchor.

detected_objects.label: blue-dress-resonant-stone
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is expressionist and densely textured, but the central paper field, pods, tendril bundle, dome, and small anchors remain separable. Texture is high, so mapping should stay tight to visible marks rather than broad zones.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
